---
title: "Sophia Wharton Gray"
---

## Sophia Wharton Gray

**Dates:** (1814-1871)

**Maiden name:** (Myddleton)

### Description

wife of the Rt. Rev. Robert Gray, Bishop of Cape Town

### Biography

[ODNB]

### Letters

- Letter from Aug 26th [1868]
- Letter from [July 1853]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
